description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design with clean lines and large windows. The structure is surrounded by a spacious yard that includes a tennis court, a swimming pool, a circular hot tub, and a wooden deck area. The building is primarily finished in light gray and white tones, with some sections featuring wood-textured panels and glass railings. The property is enclosed by a low, white perimeter wall and includes a cluster of trees for landscaping. The main entrance is adjacent to a driveway and garage, while the rear opens to recreational amenities. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, wood accents, and extensive outdoor amenities including a tennis court, pool, and deck, all within a walled yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, tennis court, and a cluster of trees at the back.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the pool, hot tub, wooden deck, and the rear facade of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tennis court, hot tub, and the back landscaping with trees.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the pool, deck, and the side elevation of the bungalow with visible windows and entry points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
